_warning: HAND-AUTHORED biome overrides for scripts/biomes.py. A sync script that overwrites this file is a bug. Values must be one of: temperate, winter, summer, desert, jungle, volcanic, sky (scripts/check_canon.py enforces this and that every slug exists).
_why_this_file_exists: The wiki fills island_type for only 15/413 islands, and where it does it can still be the wrong PAINT key — Arabasta is typed 'Summer Island' but reads as desert; Punk Hazard has no type at all yet is the fire/ice island. A biome here beats every heuristic in biomes.py. Hero islands (deep terrain in gen_terrain.py) are pinned explicitly even where a heuristic would agree, so their look never silently changes when heuristics evolve.
